title: Larry Izzo
compiled_truth: Larry Izzo is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-15 to 2001-01-30), Larry Izzo sent 7 and received 103 emails, totalling 110 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mike McConnell](people/mike-mcconnell) (3), [Thomas White](people/thomas-white) (2), [Rick Buy](people/rick-buy) (2), [Dan Leff](people/dan-leff) (2), [Joseph Sutton](people/joseph-sutton) (2).
